content:
All 7 skill documentation files have been created successfully in `d:\portfolio-draft\docs\skills\`. Here's the summary:

| File | Size | Topics Covered |
|------|------|---------------|
| `hermes-skills.md` | 26.6 KB | SKILL.md format, directory structure, CLI, config, memory system, WSL2 gotchas |
| `model-routing.md` | 37.7 KB | 3-layer routing pattern, LiteLLM config, semantic-router, RouteLLM, privacy overrides, cost analysis |
| `wsl-automation.md` | 26.5 KB | Named distros, Docker Engine, NVIDIA GPU, systemd services, idempotent installers, networking |
| `n8n-workflows.md` | 27.8 KB | JSON format, all common nodes (Gmail/Sheets/Telegram/AI Agent/IMAP/Switch), credentials, self-hosted setup |
| `astro-react.md` | 37.6 KB | Islands architecture, xterm.js integration, 3D CSS transforms, ThinkPad aesthetic, easter egg system |
| `personal-branding.md` | 25.6 KB | VIT placement tiers, LinkedIn/GitHub optimization, blogging, hackathons, cold emails, cert ROI |
| `project-handoffs.md` | 24.9 KB | 3-place rule, complete template, file verification, subagent prompts, config schemas, error tracking |

All files include:
- Table of contents with anchor links
- Comprehensive code examples (YAML, Python, TypeScript, CSS, Bash, PowerShell, JSON)
- Annotated gotchas with before/after fixes
- Quick reference sections at the bottom
- Practical templates ready for copy-paste

Files are at: `d:\portfolio-draft\docs\skills\`
